name: Cisco Syntax

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Cisco Syntax 0.2.0

### Grammar
- **Secret recognition.** The sensitive value in credential-bearing commands is now tokenized as a `secret` so it stands out in a config: `password` / `enable secret`, `username ... secret`, `snmp-server community`, ISAKMP/IKEv2 pre-shared keys, `key-string`, RADIUS/TACACS `key`, and NTP authentication keys. Recognition is heuristic and colors the value only; it does not hide or encrypt it.
- **Broader keyword coverage.** NAT (`overload`, `pool`), VRF `route-target`, QoS/MQC (`class`, `police`, `shape`, `match-all`/`match-any`, ...), and assorted globals.

### Removed
- The plugin's own copy button. Obsidian ships a copy button on code blocks, so this was redundant. The `Copy button` setting is gone.

Release assets are built in CI with GitHub build-provenance attestations.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
First release of Cisco Syntax.

Syntax highlighting for Cisco IOS, IOS-XE, IOS-XR, and NX-OS configuration in fenced code blocks tagged `cisco` (and aliases `ios`, `ios-xe`, `iosxe`, `ios-xr`, `iosxr`, `nxos`, `nx-os`, `cisco-ios`), in both Reading mode and Live Preview.

Features:
- One Prism grammar drives both Reading mode and Live Preview so the views stay in sync.
- Recognizes comments, the no/default negation prefix, command keywords, protocols, interface names, IPv4/IPv6 with CIDR, MAC addresses, strings, and numbers.
- Theme-aware colors plus an optional Vibrant palette.
- Settings tab: toggle Live Preview highlighting, copy button, color scheme, and bold keywords.
- Copy button on blocks in Reading mode.

### Manual install
Copy `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` into `<YourVault>/.obsidian/plugins/cisco-syntax/`, then enable "Cisco Syntax" under Community plugins.
